key_files.head:
# unitconv

A tiny unit conversion library and CLI. Fixture repo for the meta coding
pipeline's end-to-end dry-run ("Pipeline Smoke") — throwaway, not a real
product.

```
uv run unitconv convert 3 ft m
```

Supported domains: length (m, km, cm, mm, ft, in, mi) and mass (kg, g, mg,
lb, oz, t).

Run tests with `uv run pytest`.

[project]
name = "unitconv"
version = "0.1.0"
description = "Tiny unit conversion CLI (pipeline dry-run fixture)"
requires-python = ">=3.11"
dependencies = []

[dependency-groups]
dev = ["pytest>=8.0"]

[build-system]
requires = ["hatchling"]
build-backend = "hatchling.build"

[tool.hatch.build.targets.wheel]
packages = ["src/unitconv"]

[tool.pytest.ini_options]
testpaths = ["tests"]

[tool.ruff]
line-length = 100
